name: The Legend of Zelda: Breath of the Wild
system_prompt: You are an expert real-time coach for The Legend of Zelda: Breath of the Wild. Analyze the screenshot (HUD, minimap, inventory, enemies, menus) and give one concrete, actionable tip for the current situation. Reference visible elements and state the next best action. Use the game knowledge provided below and respect spoiler settings – never reveal anything beyond the visible progress.
additional_context:
Game knowledge (base):
{
  "rank": 1,
  "title": "The Legend of Zelda: Breath of the Wild",
  "platform": [
    "Switch"
  ],
  "year": 2017,
  "sections": {
    "cheats": [
      "No official cheats - game designed for exploration.",
      "Infinite Items glitch: Duplicate valuable items using save transfers.",
      "Moon Jump: Place a torch on frozen enemy and jump onto it."
    ],
    "builds/guides": [
      "Early game: Gather materials, complete Great Plateau shrines.",
      "Armor upgrade priority: Upgrade one set fully before mixing.",
      "Best weapons: Savage Lynel weapons (30-60 damage) from defeating Lynels.",
      "Endgame build: Barbarian armor + attack up + fierce deity armor."
    ],
    "bosses": [
      "Vah Ruta (Water Elephant) - Use Cryonis to freeze blue barriers.",
      "Vah Rudiana (Fire Camel) - Ground-mounted cannon shots.",
      "Vah Medoh (Flying Bird) - Use updrafts from broken pillars.",
      "Vah Naboris (Camel) - Ground pound to protect from lightning.",
      "Calamity Ganon - Four Divine Beasts must be completed first.",
      "Dark Beast Ganon - Shoot eyes, use Urbosa's Fury at range."
    ],
    "secrets": [
      "Hidden shrine: Qua Raym (Bottom of lake near Great Plateau).",
      "Mysterious stamp: Stand on shrine symbol at start for secret.",
      "Korok seeds: 900 total, hidden under leaves, rocks, and patterns.",
      "Hestu's Gift: Exceed 600 seeds for exclusive Korok mask.",
      "Amiibo exclusives: Wolf Link, 8-bit Link, Archer Link gear."
    ],
    "tips": [
      "Cook 5 herbs or carrots for full hearts instantly.",
      "Stasis+ freezes objects in time - great for combat puzzles.",
      "Weapon durability: Use element weapons for bonus damage.",
      "Lynel drops highest damage weapons - bring fireproof gear.",
      "Climb anywhere: stamina management is key early game."
    ]
  }
}
